This module contains multithread-safe cache implementations.
All Caches have
    getorbuild(key, builder)
    delentry(key)
methods and allow configuration when instantiating the cache class.
timec
BasicCache
maxentries
prunenum

BasicCache.getorbuildc
z' prune out entries with lowest weight. c
weight)
<listcomp>1
z1BasicCache._prunelowestweight.<locals>.<listcomp>r
lenr	
items

numentriesr"
indexr
BasicCache._prunelowestweightN)
__name__
__module__
__qualname__r
BuildcostAccessCachea
 A BuildTime/Access-counting cache implementation.
        the weight of a value is computed as the product of
            num-accesses-of-a-value * time-to-build-the-value
        The values with the least such weights are evicted
        if the cache maxentries threshold is superceded.
        For implementation flexibility more than one object
        might be evicted at a time.
    c
gettime
WeightedCountingEntry)
start
endr
BuildcostAccessCache._buildN)
__doc__r
_valuer
_oneweight)
Z	oneweightr
WeightedCountingEntry.__init__c
WeightedCountingEntry.valueN)
propertyr
AgingCachez; This cache prunes out cache entries that are too old.
    r
superr2
maxseconds)
	__class__r

	isexpiredr
AgingCache._getentryc
AgingEntryr)

expirationtimer

N)	r.
